description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsOlive coloured bag with one main compartmentPaneled front and back with buckle detailing at the sideInner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketsOne zippered pocket at backPleated bottom with oval baseTwo short handles for carrying easeMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 30 cmWidth: 40 cmDepth: 11 cm
